productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men Black Casual Shoes
description: An absolutely cool casual shoe, this pair from numero uno is a great addition to your wardrobe. The all black uppers in a classic silhouette with patterned fabric collar creates a strong impression. Team this with jeans and t-shirts for great urban style.UpperLeather upper for durability and comfortBuilt-up fabric collar in a striped pattern for greater styleLace-ups for a snug FitCushioned collar and tongue for greater comfortTextile lining for added comfortLogo seal embossed on the side and on the tongue MidsoleEVA midsole for better shock absorption and all day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole in an textured pattern for maximum durability and tractionShoe careWipe synthetic leather surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
